description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural light brown finish, featuring a slightly tapered handle that widens into a rounded barrel. The handle is marked by a series of dark, thin rings near the grip area, providing both visual contrast and potential grip enhancement. The barrel displays a prominent brand logo and some additional text, all rendered in a dark color that stands out against the wood grain. The bat's surface appears smooth and polished, with subtle wood grain patterns visible throughout its length. There is no visible grip tape, and the end cap is simply the rounded end of the wood, with no distinct cap or additional markings. The overall design is traditional, suitable for use in parks, sports fields, or as a found object in urban environments.
description: A polished, light brown wooden baseball bat with dark branding and ring markings near the handle, featuring a smooth, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand logo and text on the barrel, with visible dark rings near the handle.
description_view_1: Side view with partial visibility of the logo and a clear view of the handle's ring markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood grain of the barrel, with no visible markings or logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's ring markings and a hint of the logo on the barrel.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark, stylized logo is present on the barrel, oriented lengthwise, medium-sized, and located near the center of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_markings: The barrel features a prominent dark logo and some additional text, all in a stylized font, placed centrally on the barrel.
